raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Complaint Against Citi/Home Depot Credit Card Mishandled Dispute for Damaged Merchandise XXXX XXXX # XXXX ) Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau XXXX XXXX am filing this complaint regarding how Citi/Home Depot Credit Card mishandled a billing dispute I submitted for a damaged product I received from Home Depot.

Summary of the Issue : Merchant : Home Depot Creditor : Citi / Home Depot Credit Card Transaction Amount : {$940.00} Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Disputed Amount : {$370.00} Product Delivered : XX/XX/year> Dispute Filed : XX/XX/year> Case Number : XXXX I ordered a large shipment of 12 building panels, and when the delivery arrived, 5 of the panels were damaged. These are large ( 8x6 feet ) and heavy, making them impractical to return. I contacted the store three times by phone and sent two emails with photos, requesting a partial refund of {$370.00} ( representing about 40 % of the damaged order ). Home Depot did not resolve the issue. 

To make the product usable, I had to purchase additional materials costing over {$400.00} to repair the defective panels, not including the labor I personally invested. 

I filed a formal dispute with Citi on XX/XX/year>, providing documentation and evidence of the damage. Citi closed the dispute without resolution, telling me to work it out with the store despite my already repeated attempts. On XX/XX/year>, I contacted Citi again and asked them to reopen the dispute ( Case # XXXX ). 

Why Im Filing This Complaint : Citi has not fairly or reasonably handled my dispute, despite being provided with evidence and proper communication. I believe this violates the Fair Credit Billing Act, which requires creditors to properly investigate disputes for billing errors and defective goods.

What I Am Requesting : A full review and investigation of how Citi handled my dispute Enforcement action or correction if my rights under the FCBA were violated Reconsideration of the dispute and reversal of the {$370.00} charge Assurance that no negative credit reporting will result from this issue Supporting Documents ( attached ) : Delivery receipt Photos of damaged items Emails and records of contact with Home Depot My original dispute documentation Thank you for your attention and assistance in resolving this matter. I am requesting CFPBs support in holding the creditor accountable and protecting my consumer rights. 

Sincerely,
